title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama, exposing sync and async APIs to pull, chat, and embed with local models.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for Ollama; works in Node, Bun, and modern browsers via fetch.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: PyPI package that adds Ollama as a provider in LangChain for chat, LLM, and embedding interfaces.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Open-source ChatGPT-style web interface for Ollama models; runs in Docker and supports multi-user sessions.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community-built interactive CLI wrapper around Ollama with prompt history, snippets, and REPL mode.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama and optional WebUI on Kubernetes with GPU node selection and PVC support.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot’s inline suggestions and chat sidebar.

title: ollama4j
summary: Lightweight Java SDK for Ollama with Kotlin extensions; offers sync/async APIs and Jackson JSON parsing.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem wrapping Ollama’s REST endpoints with idiomatic Ruby objects and Fiber-based streaming.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Curated Docker Compose stacks combining Ollama, WebUI, Postgres (pgvector), and Open-WebUI for RAG setups.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration letting you use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack 2.x pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama with strongly-typed models, System.Text streaming, and dependency-injection helpers.

title: ollama-ansible
summary: Ansible role that installs Ollama binary, pulls selected models, and optionally starts systemd service.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that pipes selected notes to a local Ollama model for summarization, Q&A, or rewriting.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: Custom n8n node that adds Ollama chat and embed operations to no-code automation workflows.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Async Rust crate wrapping Ollama REST API using reqwest and serde; supports SSE streaming chat.

title: ollama-logseq
summary: Logseq plugin for querying local Ollama models from block slash commands and inserting AI replies.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that answers questions using Ollama models with per-guild model selection.

title: ollama-terraform
summary: Terraform provider to declaratively manage Ollama models and (soon) users/keys in remote instances.
